rewrite.text:
PROVE ex2: forall a b : nat, a <= b -> a <= S b
BEGIN
  ASSUME a : nat
  ASSUME b : nat
  ASSUME H : a <= b
  GOAL: a <= S b
  APPLY le_S [BY le_S]
  CONCLUDE: a <= S b [QED]
END
